name: Easthies - New Intro added
description:
Deputy Captain, Easthies

The Deputy Captain is far more keen on returning to work rather than doing interrogations or watching over festivals.

2 intros | Persona name and pronoun accessible

Second update since the bots release, technically two new intros were added but one is a make your own scenario so I'm not counting it, have fun with the meet-cute you freakazoids.

A script was also added that holds almost all major locations in Zozah, except Coco's Village and Qifrey's Atelier, I may add those two if someone wants:)

﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌

POV : Heavy implications on Brimmed Cap user, but you can be innocent and say they grabbed the wrong person!

Intro 1 : SFW , Captive User x Interrogator

﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌

POV : User can be anything, a witch, a brimmed cap, a knight, or an outsider

Intro 2 : SFW , Irritated Knight x User who doesn't watch where they're going

﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌

As of right now only the other Knights are written into the bot, you can mention them just don't expect Qifrey to randomly come save you! This may be subject to change sometime in the future!

If the bot replies for you or does anything weird it's the bot itself and not me, I don't have control of anything passed the opening message! Either edit the message or regenerate:)
creator: Sunflowerdoll
